headline: Transaction in Own Shares
summary: Transaction in Own Shares 07 May, 2026 • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • • Shell plc (the ‘Company’) announces that on 07 May, 2026 it purchased the following number of Shares for cancellation. Aggregated information on Shares purchased according to trading venue: Date of purchaseNumber of Shares purchasedHighest price paid Lowest price paid Volume weighted average price paid per shareVenueCurrency07/05/20261,000,000 £ 31.6200 £ 30.9450 £ 31.2733 LSEGBP07/05/2026230,000 £ 31.6200 £ 30.9500 £ 31.2774
